Off Calendar Jun-02-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
RULING:
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT WESTERN DENTAL SERVICES, INC.'S Motion To Strike All Costs was denied. CCP 1032 ALLOWS THE FEES. MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCE ON THE MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED IT'S TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS-
THE FOLLOWING IS THE TENTATIVE RULING FOR PLAINTIFF CLAUDIO VENTURINI'S Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award And For Entry Of Judgment: Petition confirmed in the amount of $210,068.00, plus $7,582.00 for expert fees, plus interest at ten percent from May 19, 2004 to September 21, 2005 of $28,191.13. MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION
Off Calendar Jan-05-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
RULING:
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING:
DEFENDANT WESTERN DENTAL SERVICES, INC. and JOHN KIRBY'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION: GRANTED; the proceedings are stayed pending arbitration. Request for costs is premature and is DENIED without prejudice. CCP 128 Sanctions are DENIED. Order to be submitted. (301/JLW/DS) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
